mapper.sql: link_id, link_token, title, creator_id, status, access_permission, expire_time, max_access_count, current_access_count, last_access_time, create_time, update_time, com_acct_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_share_link ( link_id, link_token, creator_id, status, access_permission, expire_time, max_access_count, current_access_count, last_access_time, create_time, update_time, com_acct_id, title ) VALUES ( #{linkId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{linkToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accessPermission,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{maxAccessCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{currentAccessCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastAccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{comAcctId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
